{{CargoClone
|name=Space Pirate
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=144
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} ATK +30
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Refine +1 Blue Demon God Material +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Refine +1 Blue Demon God Material +2.5%
|}}
